_workflow: CHARACTER VARIATION - New Pose via Detailed Prompt
_description: Generate character in new pose using detailed text prompts. SD 3.5 Medium alternative to IP-Adapter.
_best_practices: Include VERY detailed character description with colors, features, clothing. Use same description across all variations.
_character_consistency_tips: Use identical character description each time
Include specific colors (e.g., 'royal blue eyes, cream-colored fur')
Include distinguishing features (e.g., 'floppy left ear, pink nose')
Use same style preset for all character generations
Save good seeds to recreate similar results
_note: Without IP-Adapter, character consistency relies on detailed consistent prompts

inputs.text:
Character illustration for children's storybook.

STYLE:
{{STYLE}}

CHARACTER (use EXACT same description every time):
{{CHARACTER_DETAILS}}

POSE:
{{POSE}}

EXPRESSION:
{{EXPRESSION}}

BACKGROUND:
Plain white background, solid neutral color, no environment, no props.

RULES:
- Character matches description EXACTLY
- Use the specific colors and features described
- Character fully visible, not cropped
- Plain background for extraction
- Consistent art style
- No text, no watermark, no logo
wrong colors, different features, inconsistent character, background, environment, scene, multiple characters, cropped, cut off, photorealistic, 3d render, text, watermark, logo
